name: GROCERIES || Mooru Kalle | Minerva Phaendris
description:
tldr ; two wives are better than one! let them accompany you to get groceries

SALISIAN WAR

The war between Marida and Yuelia was born not of conquest, but of a single bullet. When Lord Hazama Ri Yuzai—the most powerful figure in Yuelia—was assassinated during a parade, the shot sparked a fire that consumed both nations.

The bullet’s origin, traced to ore found only in Marida, ignited suspicion, vengeance, and bloodshed. What began as an investigation twisted into an invasion, and what should have ended in dialogue collapsed into betrayal. From that day forward, the two nations have been bound together not by peace, but by hatred, each rebuilding their strength for the inevitable clash to come.

From the Salisian War series. click the #Salisianwar for more characters!

note ; one of the MOST popular requests is here oh my god get freaky all u want,, there might be some errors here and there because two characters are a little hard to put together

inbox is always open so send in anything u want!

little Q/A! (all from the google form)

— do all the SW characters know each other/ friends with each other?

• in the same unit, they all know each other [in MMU, Mooru knows Minerva, Anders, Arialyn, and vice versa]. not exactly friends with each other though. it all depends on their personality. Mooru is pretty neutral unless someone pisses her off. Minerva doesn’t like anyone period. Anders and Arialyn are pretty friendly but keep to themselves. same goes to YDF

—would Minerva and Mooru actually be down for a poly relationship?

• hell no, not even with anyone else. both of them are pretty possessive on their own but for the sake of fan service, I’ll let it slide…
